text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
With the Arc Umamusume Montjeu closing in from the outside,
Special Week shot straight through the middle of the pack and won!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
On the same course as the Japanese Derby, she showed off the power
and pride of the Derby Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Special Week has made the hopes and dreams of Japan come true!
The cheers of celebration from the stands are absolutely deafening!

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: We truly live... in a wonderful world.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Montjeu!

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: That was a splendid race, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Montjeu, Japan is filled with talented Umamusume, not just me, El,
and Grass.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So I hope that one day, we can all race together again!

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: Hehe, to think the racers here could excite me so much...

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: I shall be back.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Great!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: That was the best race everrr!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: L-listen to those cheers...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What did you expect? You just showed the rest of the world who's
boss!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Saying this to the winner herself feels strange, but I do wish you could
have felt the unity of the crowd back there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The stands were positively overflowing with cheers calling your name,
Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Actually, I did hear those cheers!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They all had such high hopes for me... so I knew I had to make this
win happen!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: And you did just that.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You were so, so cool back there!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You gave your everything to answer the crowd's expectations...
Watching you made me want to race again as soon as possible.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, you're the one who's always helping me! I mean, seeing you
after so long gave me so much strength!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And of course...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I have to thank you too!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... I've run plenty of races up until now, but never with as many
hopes and dreams as I did today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The only reason I was able to answer those dreams was because
you've always been by my side, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As she speaks, Special Week flashes her usual carefree smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But after answering the prayers of all of Japan—after making all those
dreams come true, that smile seems to shine even brighter than usual.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Special Week! Congratulations! That was amazing! Go, Ruler of
Japan! You're the best in all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: I'll never forget today! What an emotional race! You really are the best racer in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm... the best racer in Japan...

text_block_list.name: Optimistic Fan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for this win, Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Skeptical Fan
text_block_list.text:
You went up against international giants... You even beat the Arc
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Skeptical Fan
text_block_list.text: You showed us that Japan's racers—the best in Japan really can contend with the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The best racer in Japan... I've heard those words from Special Week
countless times before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But now, those words are being said to her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The people of Japan... see me as the best racer in Japan...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer... I did it... Urgh... Sniff!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey... we've got a photoshoot after this. You don't wanna be all
snotty for that, do you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You heard them! They said I'm the best in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
UUWWAAAUGH! Your dream finally came true! Go ahead and cry,
Speee!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it seems there's no stopping them now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I must say, this scene feels all too familiar for Team Sirius.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: It does?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Once again, you've made another racer's dream come true.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Ah... You're right.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Ah... You're right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we first met, Special Week was a little rough around the edges.
In some ways, that remains the same...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now that she's made the dreams of her mothers, her teammates,
and all of Japan come true, she has earned the right to be called the
best racer in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Were you watching, Mama?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I did it! I finally became the best in Japan!
